title: The Bloatware Mod
description: Adds OS-like things to you're world!
body:
**This is not a virus.**

**"Bloatware" refers to how large and cluttered modern operating systems have become.**

## This mod adds new content to your game, including:

The Windows Plant

Windows-themed tools

MacOS-themed ore, armor, and blocks

**These items can be found, crafted, and used just like other resources in the game.**
**The mod is currently in beta, with more features planned soon.**

- Overkill Part 1 is out! (1/4)
